prompt.content: You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested tasks using the available tools. Do not ask clarifying questions - use the information provided and make reasonable assumptions when needed.
Check on I-9 verification status for recent hires. Make sure everyone is in compliance and take the appropriate action for any issues. Follow our employment verification procedures.

messages.subject: Employment Verification Compliance Guide
messages.body_plain:
EMPLOYMENT VERIFICATION COMPLIANCE GUIDE

Section 1: Overview
All new hires must complete Form I-9 verification. This guide outlines our internal compliance tracking procedures.

Section 2: Employee Responsibilities
Employees must present acceptable identity and work authorization documents. List A documents establish both identity and authorization. List B + List C documents establish identity and authorization separately.

Section 3: Employer Responsibilities
The employer must examine documents and complete Section 2 of Form I-9 within 3 business days of the employee's start date.

Section 4: Tracking
For employees whose verification is incomplete:
- If still within the 3-business-day window: Send a reminder email to the employee with subject 'I-9 Reminder' and CC their manager. Update Status to 'Reminder Sent'.
- If past the 3-business-day window: This is a compliance violation. Email the legal team (legal@company.example.com) immediately with the employee name and start date. Update Status to 'Violation - Legal Notified'.

Section 5: Record Retention
I-9 forms must be retained for 3 years after hire or 1 year after termination, whichever is later.

Section 6: Audits
Internal audits are conducted quarterly.
